header: What teams bought — and what it paid back

testimonials.quote: We went Pro at €49/month for the guaranteed LTS updates — it paid for itself the first time an upgrade landed as a routine afternoon instead of a billable crisis. Early preset access is the bonus we now plan launches around.

author_image.title: Sofia Berg portrait
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: We paid €890 to have the creators install and configure Desiderio. Styleguide seeded and a theme matched to our brand before lunch — that one day saved us our first two project weeks.

author_image.title: Daniel Okonkwo portrait
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: Our team took the €690 editor workshop and adopted all 10 element groups within a week. Editors who feared the old backend now ship landing pages on their own — best training budget we ever spent.

author_image.title: Hannah Vogel portrait
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.
